image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about upwelling nutrients than social media does.
Context visual: Upwelling occurs when deep, nutrient-rich water rises to the surface.
Escalation visual: This process fuels ocean life, creating flourishing ecosystems.
Evidence visual: Studies show areas of upwelling have the highest marine productivity.
Payoff visual: Understanding this helps us protect vital marine resources.
Cta visual: Curious about more ocean science? Hit subscribe and dive deeper!
